core_integrations: Google Keep API (via gkeepapi unofficial client)
features: Sync Google Keep notes to local Markdown files
Download NotebookLM source documents to local Markdown
Dynamic 3-column UI grids for Notes and Notebooks explorer
Filter Keep notes by Tags and Date natively without API reload

patterns: View separation pattern: ui_main_frame.py routes tabs, ui/views/ handles rendering to avoid God Classes
Worker Threads: all network requests (login, fetch) execute via threading.Thread(daemon=True) to prevent blocking main UI loop
gotchas: Rich console legacy mode crashes on Windows: set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 & DATABRICKS_RUNTIME_VERSION=1 before invoking Python CLI shims
Do NOT use subprocess against 'nlm.exe' directly on Windows as it corrupts Unicode. Use [sys.executable, '-m', 'notebooklm_cli'] after uv env activation.
CustomTkinter transparency bug: do not assign fg_color='transparent' to frames housing card loops. Leave it blank/dynamic.
conventions: All views receive lambda callbacks from app.py to preserve modularity
UI layout uses .grid() natively. .pack() is strictly reserved for inside scrollable containers.
